focus: correctness audit: structural-indexer same-file CALLS edge confidence differentiation helper and gated call site

traceabilityChecks.candidateCardinality: PASS: caller symbolId is filtered before ambiguity count; recursive same-name calls are skipped upstream and do not reach the helper
traceabilityChecks.evidenceClassTyping: PASS: INFERRED and AMBIGUOUS match EdgeEvidenceClass
traceabilityChecks.callSiteCoverage: PASS: every emitted same-file CALLS edge uses differentiated metadata when the flag is true; legacy metadata remains when false
traceabilityChecks.duplicateNameScopes: PASS: same-name multi-candidate files are downgraded to ambiguous after excluding the caller
traceabilityChecks.priorFindings: No duplicate prior finding emitted; active prior P1s keep packet verdict conditional

claim: The gated helper is invoked for every same-file CALLS edge emitted by structural-indexer when SPECKIT_CODE_GRAPH_EDGE_CONFIDENCE_DIFFERENTIATION is true.
boundary: The existing extractor skips same-name recursive calls before edge creation, so those calls are outside the differentiated metadata path.
